name: bmad-extensions
description: Sprint and epic execution orchestration with adversarial quality gates. Includes red team security review.
author: ravensorb

skills.name: bmad-sprint-execute
skills.description: Orchestrate a complete sprint end-to-end: story prep → dev → code review → QA → fix loop per story, then retrospective → adversarial review → red team at closure. Uses subagent delegation for fresh context per phase.

skills.name: bmad-epic-execute
skills.description: Orchestrate a complete epic end-to-end: runs sprint(s) via bmad-sprint-execute, then epic-level retrospective → adversarial review → red team → architecture drift analysis → functional completeness review.

skills.name: bmad-red-team
skills.description: Adversarial security and resilience review from four threat actor perspectives: external attacker, malicious insider, chaos engineer, abusive legitimate user. Structured findings by severity.
